title: Rhythm Machine
description: 8-track drum sequencer with synthesized sounds, 4 kits, swing, and WAV export.
concept: A fully synthesized 8-track drum sequencer built on the Web Audio API. Choose from 808, Acoustic, Electro, and Lo-Fi kits — all generated procedurally with no samples. Compose 16 or 32-step patterns across kick, snare, clap, hi-hats, toms, and ride, then record your session to a stereo WAV file.
features: 8 synthesized drum tracks (kick, snare, clap, closed/open hat, hi/lo tom, ride)
4 drum kits with distinct synthesis parameters (808, Acoustic, Electro, Lo-Fi)
BPM control (60–180) with tap tempo, plus swing control
16 or 32-step grid with 4 saveable patterns (A–D) in localStorage
● REC + ▼ WAV — record live audio and export as a real stereo WAV file

interaction.mouse: Click grid cells to toggle steps on/off; click Play to start
interaction.click: Kit buttons, pattern A–D, Tap Tempo, Record, Export WAV
interaction.touch: Touch grid cells to toggle steps; all controls touch-friendly
interaction.keyboard: Space = play/stop, R = record, 1–4 = switch pattern
